zh.lifeSummary: 當Béatrice de BOURBOURG於大約1180年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德布爾布格時，她的父親Gauthier de BOURBOURG41歲，母親Mathilde de Béthune28歲。她和Comte Arnould II de Guînes至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1214年8月在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯i斯享年35歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Béatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Béatrice de BOURBOURG was born about 1180, in Bourbourg, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Gauthier de BOURBOURG, was 41 and her mother, Mathilde de Béthune, was 28. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Comte Arnould II de Guînes. She died in August 1214, in Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Béatrice de BOURBOURG est née environ 1180, à Bourbourg, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Gauthier de BOURBOURG, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Béthune, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Comte Arnould II de Guînes. Elle est décédée en août 1214, à Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Béatrice de BOURBOURG um 1180 in Bourbourg, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gauthier de BOURBOURG 41 und ihre Mutter Mathilde de Béthune 28. Sie hatte mit Comte Arnould II de Guînes mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im August 1214 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrice de BOURBOURG è nata il circa 1180 nel Bourbourg, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Gauthier de BOURBOURG, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Mathilde de Béthune, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Comte Arnould II de Guînes. Morì nel agosto 1214, nel Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Béatrice de BOURBOURGが約1180年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードボウルボウルグで生まれた時，父Gauthier de BOURBOURGは41歳，母Mathilde de Béthuneは28歳であった。彼女はComte Arnould II de Guînesとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1214年8月にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスカレイスグiンスで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Béatrice de BOURBOURG(이)가 대략 1180년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 부르보우르그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gauthier de BOURBOURG(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de Béthune(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Comte Arnould II de Guînes(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1214년 8월 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이 구i네스에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrice de BOURBOURG nasceu aproximadamente 1180, em Bourbourg, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Gauthier de BOURBOURG, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Béthune, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Comte Arnould II de Guînes. Ela faleceu em agosto de 1214, em Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Béatrice de BOURBOURG родилась около 1180 г. в местности бурбург, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Gauthier de BOURBOURG было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Béthune, 28. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Comte Arnould II de Guînes. Она умерла август 1214 г. в местности гуiнесь, калеи, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Béatrice de BOURBOURG nació aproximadamente 1180, en Bourbourg, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Gauthier de BOURBOURG, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Béthune, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Comte Arnould II de Guînes. Murió en agosto de 1214, en Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 35 años.
